changeSet.author: ogc-51
changeSet.comment: Fix chk_location_type_valid constraint to include 'box' as a valid location type. Migration 018-allow-null-location-for-disposed accidentally removed 'box' from the valid values when updating the constraint to allow NULL.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_assignment DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_location_type_valid;

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_assignment DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_location_type_valid;
